name: The Deep
personality: Ancient beyond comprehension. Not malicious, not kind — geological. Thinks in millennia. When The Deep speaks (rarely), the ground trembles. Doesn't understand urgency. Everything is temporary to something that old.
power_manifestation: Earthquakes, mountain formation, mineral veins. Blessings manifest as unbreakable endurance. Curses manifest as petrification — not death, but eternal stillness.
limitations: Cannot act quickly. Every divine action takes days to manifest. Cannot affect anything not touching the ground.
description: The oldest god. Not worshipped so much as acknowledged — you don't pray to gravity, but you respect it. The Deep existed before anything walked on the world and will exist after everything stops.
